name: Archoderis– futa dragon
description:
Hello, this is my first bot, so to speak. I worked hard on it and I hope you like it. It was originally created for debauchery, but I also tried to ensure that it wasn't the only thing it had. I hope it worked out well, and I apologize for any mistakes that may occur; English isn't my native language, and I find it difficult to work with.

The bot was generally inspired by a magical theme. I also came up with the character's name by chance, just thinking about what dragon names might sound like. Then I found out what her name was, but I didn't want to change it.

I created a typically fantasy world, but in a modern setting. I hope you like it.

Maybe in the future I'll make a few more initial messages where she's already become your girlfriend, or with some holiday or event.
creator: Lat Cat
